title: Tiko Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tiko with a Z-Score of +3.83. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tiko is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 72%, and wind speed is at 4.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
